name: seven
description: Send SMS and make text-to-speech calls

fields.label: From
fields.description: The caller ID displayed in the receivers display. Max 16 numeric or 11 alphanumeric characters.

fields.label: To
fields.description: The number of your recipient(s) separated by comma. Can be regular numbers or contact/groups from seven.

fields.label: Message
fields.description: The message to send. Max. 1520 characters

fields.label: Options
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: delay, foreign_id, flash, label, performance_tracking, ttl)

endpoints.label: Send Voice Call

fields.label: To
fields.description: The number of your recipient(s) separated by comma. Can be regular numbers or contact/groups from seven.

fields.label: Message
fields.description: The message to send. Max. 1520 characters

endpoints.description: Converts text to voice and calls a given number
